hypothesis.thesis_statement: Describe the thesis in plain words.
hypothesis.mechanism: Explain why the signal should exist and what investor behavior or market structure causes it.

pre_registered_concerns.most_likely_failure_mode: The signal may only work in a narrow liquidity regime and disappear when market leadership rotates.
pre_registered_concerns.weakest_assumption: The ranking signal assumes the behavioral pattern is stable across the chosen universe and rebalance horizon.
pre_registered_concerns.what_would_falsify_this: If the formal IS tests fail the pre-registered thresholds or the sealed OOS result reverses sign, the thesis is false.
pre_registered_concerns.priors_on_cost_sensitivity: Expected to weaken materially when turnover rises or when round-trip trading costs move above moderate A-share execution assumptions.
